title: COSCO India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: COSCO India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the COSCO India family as a Warehouse Manager in Jodhpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About COSCO India:
COSCO India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with COSCO India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
